cropHealth.title: Crop Health
cropHealth.subtitle: NDVI mapping, health scoring, and trend interpretation for early intervention planning.
cropHealth.formDescription: Select the crop you want to grow and get a real, persisted prediction.
cropHealth.latestPrediction: Latest prediction results for your crop.
cropHealth.runFirstPrediction: Run your first prediction above to see health score.
cropHealth.allSavedPredictions: All saved predictions for this field.
cropHealth.fieldNotRegistered: Field not registered yet. Register your field in My Farm to unlock crop health.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.subtitle: Conversational assistant with full farm context, recent signals, and recommendation memory.
aiAssistant.welcomeDescription: Ask about your crop health, weather, market prices, or get farming advice.
aiAssistant.micNotSupported: Voice input not supported in this browser.
aiAssistant.farmerNotFound: Farmer profile not found. Complete registration to chat with the assistant.
aiAssistant.perField: Each field has its own separate conversation thread.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account information, language preferences, and workspace configuration.
settings.languageDesc: Choose your preferred language for the dashboard.

loanEligibility.title: Loan Eligibility
loanEligibility.subtitle: Bank-style assessment with score factors, risk adjustments, and lending-ready report.
loanEligibility.noFieldsAvailable: No fields registered. Register a field first.

marketInsights.title: Market Insights
marketInsights.subtitle: Mandi movement analysis with multi-chart comparison for smarter selling decisions.
marketInsights.autoDetected: Your state & district are auto-detected from registration. Select a crop to fetch APMC prices.
marketInsights.priceDesc: Min, modal, and max prices across APMCs near your location.
marketInsights.noPriceData: No price data available for this crop.
marketInsights.noApmcs: No APMCs found for your district.

whatIfSimulator.title: What-If Simulator
whatIfSimulator.subtitle: Scenario simulation for crop and irrigation strategy with live projected outputs.
whatIfSimulator.noResult: Run a simulation to see projected outcomes.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Health score, weather signals, active alerts, and AI intelligence in one live snapshot.
overview.noData: No data yet. Register a field and run your first prediction.

weather.title: Weather & Alerts
weather.subtitle: Localized forecast, severe condition detection, and event history for operational timing.

quickGuide.title: Quick Guide
quickGuide.subtitle: Fast onboarding workflow to get farm tracking, alerts, and insights configured quickly.
quickGuide.step1: Register as a farmer with your name and phone.
quickGuide.step2: Go to My Farm and draw your field boundary on the map.
quickGuide.step3: Visit Crop Health and run your first prediction.
quickGuide.step4: Check Market Insights for live mandi prices.
quickGuide.step5: Use AI Assistant to ask questions about your farm.
